We are the first and only brand in this niche by combining three identities: American, trade (blue collar worker), and humor (funny/cool shirts). We need many designs to be done in a short period of time, we are looking to hire 2 designers. We need a variety of designs completed, roughly 15-20. We are a new brand that is launching and we are aiming to scale with a limited edition sale for America 250 years. The scope of the work is 15-20 designs that showcase America and blue collar workers through text and visuals that are humorous or serious. Then we need 9 designs that showcase 250 years of America. title: Graphic Designer: T-Shirts & Apparel (Mid-Entry Level)
desc: We’re looking for an mid-entry level graphic designer to help with production and execution work for our t-shirt and apparel brands. title: Jewellery Branding & Poster Design
desc: Looking for a Budget-Friendly Branding & Poster Designer for a Jewellery Startup We are a growing jewellery startup looking for a creative and experienced graphic designer who can help us build a strong brand identity within a reasonable budget. title: Jewellery retouch
desc: Job Description: We're looking for a highly skilled jewelry retoucher (individual or team) for a long-term, ongoing collaboration — not a one-time job. Scope of Work Ongoing yearly project, not a single task. Up to 5,000 pieces per year. Each piece is photographed from multiple angles, so total volume may reach 10,000 images per year. Required Deliverables JPG files PNG files (transparent background) Quality Standards The final result must match the quality level of the attached sample images — clean metal, sharp and well-defined stones, accurate reflections, consistent lighting, clean background, and stable quality across the entire volume. Consistency across thousands of images matters just as much as the quality of a single image. What to Include in Your Proposal 1-Price per image, and whether you offer special bulk pricing for large volumes. 2-Expected turnaround time — per image or per batch — and how many images you can deliver per day. 3-Links to previous work specifically in jewelry retouching (not general retouching). 4-How you ensure consistent quality across large volumes. Selection Criteria: Final selection will be based on the best balance of highest quality and lowest price. Please make sure your sample work reflects the quality level shown in our reference images,

title: Logo Recreation & Vectorization
desc: PROJECT: Last Man Standing Logo Recreation & Vectorization I am looking for a professional graphic designer to recreate and refine an existing logo concept into a clean, production-ready vector logo. Brand Name: LAST MAN STANDING Tagline: ENDURE • PREVAIL Brand Personality: Rugged, resilient, western, gritty, masculine, enduring, and timeless. Design Concept: The logo features: * A weathered cowboy skull * A western cowboy hat * Crossed revolvers behind the skull * Distressed western typography * Strong vintage western aesthetic The overall feel should communicate endurance, perseverance, toughness, and western heritage. IMPORTANT: I am NOT looking for AI-generated artwork or an automatic image trace. I need the artwork professionally recreated as clean vector artwork suitable for commercial apparel and merchandise. Deliverables: 1. Primary Logo * Full logo with skull, hat, revolvers, typography, and tagline 2. Simplified Logo Version * Suitable for small prints, stickers, social media, and branding 3. Transparent Background Version Required File Formats: * AI * EPS * SVG * PDF * Transparent PNG (300 DPI) The logo will be used on: * T-shirts * Hoodies * Stickers * Social media * Website branding * Merchandise Requirements: * Fully editable vector artwork * Commercial rights inclu

title: Luxury Brand Identity Suite
desc: I’m building a unified luxury presence that spans graphic design, videography, photography, and an elegant website. The entire look must feel premium yet minimal: black backgrounds, crisp white type, and a typography-driven logo reminiscent of the world’s top fashion houses. I do not want icons, flourishes, or complex graphics—clean lines and impeccable spacing will let the brand speak for itself. High-quality visuals sit at the heart of this project. I’ll supply creative direction, but I need you to capture and prepare high-resolution images suitable for both retina-ready web use and large-format print. Every pixel should look flawless after scaling, so expert post-processing in Photoshop or Lightroom is essential. Once the photographic assets are secured, they will flow into social graphics, video intros/outros, and, most critically, a sleek, modern website. The site must carry the same black-and-white elegance, load quickly, and display perfectly on any screen size. Figma (or a comparable UI tool) for mock-ups and a standards-based front-end build will keep the hand-off smooth. Deliverables • Custom, typography-only logo in vector format • Brand style guide: fonts, colour specs (black/white), usage rules • A curated set of retouched, high-resolution photos (web + print) • 2–3

title: Luxury E-commerce Brand Visuals
desc: I’m creating a high-end brand that unites graphic design, videography, photography and a streamlined e-commerce website. The entire identity must feel unmistakably premium: think a deep black canvas paired with crisp white typography, minimal ornamentation, and a confident, modern layout. Logo & Core Identity The logo has to rely purely on typography—no symbols, icons or complex marks. Clean letterforms, balanced kerning and a subtle nod to luxury brands such as Saint Laurent or Balenciaga are key. Alongside the primary lock-up, I’ll need a monochrome palette, font recommendations and usage rules so every asset—from product packaging to video title cards—stays consistent. E-commerce Experience The site’s main job is selling. It should showcase products elegantly while highlighting verified customer reviews (this is the one essential feature I specified). Wireframes or high-fidelity mock-ups for the home page, product grid, detailed product page and checkout will be required, all set on the black-and-white theme. Responsive behaviour across desktop and mobile is mandatory. Visual Extensions To support videography and photography, supply adaptable templates or style frames that echo the website and logo treatment. This way all hero videos, lookbook photos and social teasers carry t

title: Outdoor Vector Illustrator for Screenprint Motifs (with Embroidery Text/Border)
desc: Description: We are looking for a skilled vector illustrator to turn our mockups into production‑ready files for premium outdoor headwear. We provide: Mockups Brand style and references Exact text + border layout You deliver: Screenprint‑ready vector illustration (AI/SVG) for twill/canvas Embroidery‑ready text + border (clean stitch‑optimized outlines) Solid color layers (no gradients) Final export package (AI + PDF + PNG) Style we need: Outdoor / heritage / wildlife Clean vector shapes Strong silhouettes Minimalist but premium Works well on caps and apparel Technical requirements: Vector only (AI/SVG) Screenprint‑ready vector illustration (6–12 solid colors, depending on motif) Screenprint‑friendly linework Embroidery‑friendly text and border Pantone/HEX control Workflow: We start with one test motif. If the quality is right, we continue with a full series, Please include in your proposal: Portfolio with vector illustrations (not packaging, not photo editing) Apparel or screenprint examples (if available) Your fixed price per finished file (we provide mockups)

title: Social Media and Design Specialist
desc: Tough People – Brand & Project Overview Tough People is a lifestyle and community-driven brand centered around resilience, strength, and connection through life’s hardest moments. The brand was inspired by my personal experiences navigating grief, loss, motherhood, healing, and rebuilding after difficult seasons of life. The mission of Tough People is to create products, content, and a community that make people feel seen, supported, and strong — especially during challenging times. I want the brand to feel authentic, emotional, hopeful, and relatable, while also building a recognizable and impactful online presence. Right now, Tough People primarily consists of apparel and social media content, but I want to grow it into a much larger brand and community. I am looking for someone to help me elevate and expand the brand digitally. What I Need Help With Social Media Growth & Strategy Growing and optimizing Instagram and TikTok Creating a stronger, cohesive brand presence across platforms Increasing engagement, reach, and followers organically Developing a content strategy that aligns with the mission and voice of the brand Helping identify trends, opportunities, and ways to grow visibility Content Creation Support Assistance brainstorming and planning content ideas Short-form vide

title: Streetwear Designer, Content Creator & Brand Growth Strategist (Long-Term Opportunity)
desc: We are building a premium streetwear fashion startup focused on exclusivity, storytelling, culture, and community. Our goal is not simply to sell clothing. We want to build a brand that people actively follow, engage with, talk about, and wait for before every product release. We are looking for a creative and ambitious individual who understands modern streetwear culture, Gen Z consumer psychology, fashion design, content creation, and organic brand growth. This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to help build a fashion brand from the ground up. --- ## Our Vision We are building the brand around a limited-drop model. Instead of constantly releasing products, we will launch carefully planned collections and exclusive drops. Key principles: • Limited quantities per design • Approximately 50 units per design • No restocks once sold out • Exclusive and collectible products • Story-driven launches • Community-first growth • Organic hype generation We want customers to feel that owning a piece from a drop is special because once it is gone, it is gone forever. Because of this, product design, storytelling, and community building are equally important. --- ## What We Need Most The most important part of this role is product design. We are looking for someone who can creat

title: Video Editor for TikTok / Meta Ad Campaign | Loungewear & Cozy Living Brand
desc: I'm a content creator partnering with a well-known brand in the loungewear and cozy living space, and I'm looking for a reliable video editor to join me on an ongoing ad campaign. The work: You'll be editing 6–15 short-form videos per week, each 30–45 seconds long, built specifically for TikTok and Meta ads. I handle all the filming and upload the raw footage to a shared folder. You take it from there: cutting, pacing, captions, sound, and polishing into scroll-stopping ads ready to run. You'll work with clear editing guidelines and brand direction, so you won't have to guess about style or tone. This is a steady, recurring weekly workload, not a one-off project. What you'll be responsible for: Editing raw footage into finished 30–45 second ads for TikTok and Meta Following provided brand guidelines, style references, and direction closely Adding captions, on-screen text, transitions, music/sound, and pacing suited to short-form ads Delivering a consistent weekly batch on schedule Light revisions based on feedback Skills I'm looking for: Proven experience editing short-form vertical video (TikTok, Reels, Meta ads) Strong sense of pacing, rhythm, and hook-driven storytelling Clean, accurate captioning and on-screen text Comfort with fast turnaround and a recurring high-volume work

Salary: ₹8,000 – ₹15,000/month (Depending on work) Work Type: Work From Home Timing: Flexible Working Hours: Approx. 4–6 hours/day Location Preference: Ahmedabad-based applicants preferred, not mandatory Eligibility: Indians only Responsibilities: * Edit Instagram Reels and Meta Ads * Create engaging, fast-paced content optimized for conversions and engagement * Add transitions, text overlays, music, sound effects, and motion graphics where required * Repurpose existing content into multiple formats and variations * Work closely with the brand team to execute creative concepts Requirements: * Good understanding of short-form content and social media trends * Experience with Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, Final Cut Pro, or similar editing software * Strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and visual aesthetics * Knowledge of AI-powered editing tools is a plus * Ability to deliver projects within deadlines * Experience with fashion, luxury, jewellery, or e-commerce brands is a bonus, not mandatory What We Offer: * Long-term opportunity with a growing D2C brand * Flexible working hours * Paid subscriptions to AI tools when required

title: [Full-time] Graphic Designers for Anime Product Promotions
desc: We’re offering an exciting fully remote role with flexible hours and long-term, full-time work available. Excellent performance and work ethic will be rewarded with consistent pay raises and bonuses. We’re not for everyone. title: AI Social Media Videos creator
desc: I have a steady stream of social-media posts that start as written copy and a bank of still images, and I want each piece transformed into an engaging, short promotional video. The content you’ll receive is a mix of headlines, product descriptions, and high-resolution photos; your job is to turn that material into mixed-media clips that feel native on Instagram Reels, TikTok, Facebook, and LinkedIn. You’re free to lean on any AI workflow that suits you—text-to-speech, motion graphics generators, or image-to-video tools—so long as the final result smoothly blends the provided text and imagery, adds eye-catching motion, and remains on-brand. Think dynamic typography, subtle animated overlays, and upbeat royalty-free audio that supports the promotional message without overpowering it. Key deliverables for each post: • A 15–30 or 45 to 60 second MP4 in 1080 × 1920 vertical (and a square 1080 × 1080 crop when feasible) • An SRT file or hard-coded captions reflecting the on-screen text • A thumbnail frame that works as a still preview Acceptance criteria: • Both the supplied text and images are clearly featured. • Transitions and effects enhance, not distract. • Colors and fonts match the brand guidelines I’ll share after kickoff. • File sizes stay under typical platform limits (under

title: Airport Advertisement Designer

The design should immediately communicate international business opportunities, global mobility, offshore company formation, and international banking solutions. title: Book Cover Design
desc: Here's a fuller brief for the designer: Book Cover Design Brief - Speedrunning Capitalism Hello, I have finished writing my book and require a front cover designed, with a back cover to follow once the physical edition is confirmed. The Book Title: Speedrunning Capitalism Subtitle: How Business Acquisition Accelerates Your Wealth Author: Brandon Lipman Speedrunning Capitalism is a business acquisition guide for the middle class. It's direct, practical and unapologetic. Not a traditional business book - no corporate tone, no fluff. Think closer to Alex Hormozi's visual aesthetic than a Harvard Business Review publication. Current Draft I have attached a draft cover I've put together in Canva. You're welcome to improve on this layout or take it in a completely different creative direction - I'm open to both. The Image The current draft uses an arrow breaking through a horizontal line. The concept is: something fast, precise and powerful breaking through a ceiling or orbit. The arrow works as a metaphor for both a traditional arrow and a rocket - deliberately ambiguous. I specifically don't want a rocket. Rockets are overused on business books and too literal. The arrow-breaking-through-a-line concept captures the same idea without being cliche. If you have a stronger creative idea

title: Branding m: Basepointe Consulting
desc: I have a finalized logo concept and brand board. I am NOT looking for new logo design concepts. I need the attached logo recreated as a professional vector logo package. Please recreate the logo exactly as shown and provide the following: • SVG • AI (Adobe Illustrator) • EPS • PDF Vector • Transparent PNG (300 DPI) • Black version • White version • Full color version Please create separate files for: 1. Primary Logo 2. Secondary Horizontal Logo 3. Circular BP Submark 4. Square App Icon / Social Media Icon 5. Website Header Logo 6. Email Signature Logo Brand Details: Business Name: Basepointe Tagline: Structure. Support. Streamlined. Colors: Soft Blush #F9E7E3 Rose Blush #E8A3A8 Warm Mauve #C3878F Warm Taupe #B8A695 Charcoal #2F2F2F Soft Cream #FAF6F3 Fonts (or closest match): Cormorant Garamond Montserrat Please maintain the integrated script “B” with the Basepointe wordmark and keep the overall style elegant, modern, professional, and suitable for a business operations consulting company. This is a vectorization/recreation project, not a redesign project.

title: Business Card Design - Financial Advisory
desc: Business Card Design Project I am looking for a designer to create a modern, minimalist business card for a financial advisory company. The objective is to develop a premium and professional design that reflects trust, credibility, financial expertise, and long-term client relationships. The overall look and feel should be clean, elegant, and suitable for a financial advisory brand. The existing business card design will be provided for reference. Key requirements: Front and back business card design Modern, minimalist, and professional aesthetic Strong emphasis on trust, credibility, and financial advisory expertise Clear presentation of: Name and designation Contact information Company logo and branding Tagline to be included: "Smarter Repayments, Greater Savings" Brand direction: The design should take visual inspiration from our existing corporate identity and website. Primary colour references, iconography, and overall brand direction should align with: www.fismanagement.com Deliverables: Print-ready files (CMYK, 300 DPI PDF or EPS) Editable source files (Adobe Illustrator or Adobe InDesign) At this stage, only a high-level design concept is required. Detailed brand guidelines and additional requirements will be shared with the selected designer. Please share relevant exampl

title: Create Editable PowerPoint presentation with animation from image based slides
desc: Job description We are looking for a professional PowerPoint designer who can recreate an existing image based presentation into a fully editable, high quality PowerPoint file with clean layout, professional animation, and modern visual design. The current presentation is available as images or screenshots. The selected freelancer must convert each slide into an editable PowerPoint format, not just place the image inside PowerPoint. Scope of work The freelancer will recreate the presentation using editable PowerPoint elements, including: Editable text boxes Editable shapes and cards Editable icons and graphic elements Editable tables, charts, timelines, workflow diagrams, and infographics Professional slide layout and alignment Consistent colors, fonts, spacing, and branding Smooth slide transitions Simple professional animations for text, cards, icons, charts, and process flows Master slide setup for consistent branding Final PowerPoint file ready for presentation and future editing Design style required The design should follow a modern corporate presentation style with: Clean and professional layout High fidelity UI and UX inspired presentation style Figma style visual structure Pixel perfect alignment Modern dashboard style elements where needed Professional use of icons, car

title: Create a Baby Book Pamphlet
desc: I'm looking for a creative freelancer to design a guidance pamphlet for a baby book box. The pamphlet will include parenting tips focused on developmental milestones. Key Requirements: - Company logo integration - Focus on developmental milestones - Friendly and casual tone Ideal Skills and Experience: - Graphic design - Experience with pamphlet/brochure design - Ability to write engaging, friendly content I have a mock up but am I happy to make as many changes as it needs. We also need to consult about the logo to ensure everything is okay on that front so potential to design a logo. Looking forward to your proposals!

title: Design a Two-Page A4 Brochure
desc: I am looking for someone to prepare and design a two-page A4 brochure for a financial services business. The brochure should be created using Canva, ensuring it is visually appealing and effectively communicates the business's offerings. The ideal candidate will have experience in brochure design and be able to deliver a professional-looking document within a short timeframe.

title: Event Pitch Deck PowerPoint Design
desc: I’m preparing for an upcoming industry event and need a polished, professional-looking PowerPoint deck that will help me secure a panel-discussion slot and impress prospective clients in the room. The presentation has to carry a strong corporate tone—sleek, on-brand visuals, concise copy, and data points that speak directly to a client audience. Here’s what I’m after: • 8–10 slide deck, fully editable in PowerPoint • Consistent typography, colour palette and iconography in line with typical corporate standards • Visual storytelling that highlights why the panel discussion is valuable, how it aligns with the event’s theme, and the benefits attendees (especially clients) will gain • Space for stats, speaker bios, and a call-to-action I can customise as details finalise • Subtle animation or transitions to keep attention without distracting from the message I’ll supply the raw content (speaker info, key figures, brand guidelines) once we start; your job is to transform it into a client-facing narrative that looks boardroom-ready and delivers a clear, persuasive pitch. Please share a couple of sample slides or links to past corporate decks so I can gauge your style.

title: Expert Dark Themed Pitch Deck Designer — $100 Fixed Budget — Read Before Applying
desc: We represent a client who needs a 15 page premium dark themed private lending brief designed as a production ready PDF. This is a portrait format document — not a slide deck. If you have designed dark themed investor decks, private placement memorandums, or premium financial presentation documents you are the right person. If $100 fixed is not acceptable do not apply. That number is final and it is not moving under any circumstance. Here is why $100 is fair. Everything is already done. Every word written and final. Every hex code locked. Every font and size specified for every element on every page. Every layout instruction documented. Logo package ready in SVG and PNG. Two full page infographic reference images provided with complete written reproduction instructions. Website template provided as your visual framework to clone. You open the files and execute. Source premium dark themed imagery. Reproduce two complex infographics at full 8.5 x 11 production scale at 300 DPI minimum. Make it look world class. You write nothing. You strategize nothing. Pure execution on a silver platter. AI tools are highly encouraged. Midjourney, DALL-E, Adobe Firefly, ChatGPT — use everything. We care about the result not the method. REQUIREMENTS Figma or Adobe InDesign only. No Canva. No templat

title: Facebook Ads campaign creation + Management for Final-Expense Calls
desc: I need a full-service Facebook advertising setup designed to drive qualified traffic to my existing final expense landing page. The objective is crystal-clear: boost landing page visits so those visitors convert into live phone call leads. The core message that must dominate every version of the creative is: “Affordable final expense plans.” Ad copy, headlines, and any supporting visuals should reinforce that benefit without over-promising or using prohibited insurance language. You will: • Write compelling primary text, headlines, and descriptions focused on affordability and peace of mind. • Design one scroll-stopping image or a short 15-second motion graphic compliant with Meta’s policies. • Build and launch the campaign inside Ads Manager, selecting the most relevant placements, optimization event, and conversion objective to maximise landing-page clicks. • Configure the Meta pixel (or CAPI if you prefer) plus standard call-tracking UTM parameters so I can measure cost-per-visit and downstream call volume in Google Analytics and RingCentral. • Hand over a brief launch report outlining targeting, creative, daily spend, and desired KPI benchmarks, then provide performance data after the first seven days. Acceptance criteria 1. Campaign is live and spending with no policy flags.

title: Fresh Graphics and redesigning for VC Website
desc: I run a venture-capital firm and the site that represents us needs a visual lift. The structure, copy and flow all work, but the graphics feel dated. I’d like a designer to introduce new, high-quality visuals that match our brand and instantly communicate credibility. Here’s what I need: • A cohesive set of web-ready graphics for the key sections I’ll outline (approximately 8–10 assets, including a new hero image, section illustrations and a few subtle icons). • Files delivered in optimised PNG/SVG plus editable source files—Figma, PSD or AI are all fine. • Brief implementation notes or lightweight CSS so my developer can slot everything in without guesswork. Acceptance criteria: • Style aligns with the colour palette and logo in the brand guide I’ll share once we start. • Retina-ready, compressed for speedy load times (under 200 KB for hero visuals, under 50 KB for icons). • Scales cleanly across common breakpoints—desktop, tablet and mobile. If you’ve refreshed finance or tech sites before, point me to a couple of examples. I’m excited to see how your design expertise can make the site look as forward-thinking as the companies we back.

title: Graphic designer needed to build a white paper that we can turn into a PDF download ad.
desc: Build a white paper that we can use in a web ad campaign where people can download a PDF of the white paper. There are two examples attached (one from our company, Net Worth Advisory Group, and one from Nationwide). We mostly need help with colors and layout. We have the white paper going through its final grammar and concept edits at the moment. It will be available shortly.

title: Investor Pitch Deck Creation
desc: I need someone who can create a visually elegant and compelling investor pitch deck in PowerPoint using my existing copy and brand assets. The ideal candidate will have experience in presentation design and a strong understanding of how to effectively communicate key messages through visual elements. Creativity and attention to detail are essential for this role.

title: Investor Pitch Deck Designer Needed for Technology Venture Presentation
desc: We are looking for an experienced presentation designer to create a professional investor pitch deck for an innovative thermal management / cooling technology opportunity. The project involves taking existing information, concepts, and reference materials and turning them into a clean, modern, investor-focused presentation. The deck will focus on: * Technology opportunity * Joint venture/business structure * Market potential * Competitive positioning * Investor opportunity * Financial/growth vision * Professional visual storytelling We already have: * Existing materials and ideas * Reference deck structure * Company background information * Direction for the presentation What we need: * Professional PowerPoint or Google Slides deck * Strong visual design * Clear formatting and layout * Investor-ready presentation style * Ability to simplify technical/business information
